history.content: Draw a flowchart of how a user login system works, from entering credentials to being granted or denied access.

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[User enters username/email + password]
    B --> C[Click Login]
    C --> D{Input format valid?}

D -- No --> E[Show validation error]
    E --> B

D -- Yes --> F[Find user in database]
    F --> G{User exists?}

G -- No --> H[Show Invalid credentials]
    H --> Z[Access denied]

G -- Yes --> I{Account active and not locked?}
    I -- No --> J[Show account locked/disabled message]
    J --> Z

I -- Yes --> K[Verify password hash]
    K --> L{Password correct?}

L -- No --> M[Increment failed login attempts]
    M --> N{Attempts exceeded threshold?}
    N -- Yes --> O[Lock account]
    O --> Z
    N -- No --> H

L -- Yes --> P{MFA enabled?}
    P -- No --> Q[Create session/JWT]
    P -- Yes --> R[Prompt for MFA code]
    R --> S{MFA code valid?}
    S -- No --> T[Show MFA error]
    T --> Z
    S -- Yes --> Q

Q --> U[Set secure auth cookie/token]
    U --> V[Log successful login event]
    V --> W[Redirect to dashboard]
    W --> Y[Access granted]

Z --> X[End]
    Y --> X
```
